description: Task dependency graph for implementing a static HTML/CSS webpage showcasing Wuhan snacks

tasks.name: Initialize Project Structure
tasks.description: Create all necessary directories and base files as defined in the architecture

tasks.name: Implement CSS Reset
tasks.description: Create reset.css to normalize default browser styles across different platforms

tasks.name: Build HTML Skeleton
tasks.description: Create semantic HTML5 structure with all required sections (header, hero, snacks, footer)

tasks.name: Implement Base CSS Styles
tasks.description: Set up design system variables (colors, typography) and global styles in styles.css

tasks.name: Create Header Component
tasks.description: Style the page header with navigation, logo, and responsive behavior

tasks.name: Create Hero Section
tasks.description: Implement introductory section with Wuhan culinary theme and responsive layout

tasks.name: Prepare Snack Content Data
tasks.description: Research and compile information for at least 5 Wuhan snacks (names, descriptions, facts)

tasks.name: Source and Optimize Images
tasks.description: Find appropriate snack images, optimize for web, and place in images/ directory

tasks.name: Implement Snacks Grid Layout
tasks.description: Create responsive grid/container for snack cards with mobile-first approach

tasks.name: Create Individual Snack Cards
tasks.description: Design and implement snack card components with image, title, description, and details

tasks.name: Create Footer Component
tasks.description: Implement page footer with credits, links, and responsive styling

tasks.name: Implement Responsive Breakpoints
tasks.description: Add media queries for tablet and desktop views based on defined breakpoints

tasks.name: Cross-Browser Testing
tasks.description: Test page functionality and appearance across Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge

tasks.name: Responsive Device Testing
tasks.description: Verify layout and functionality on mobile, tablet, and desktop screen sizes

tasks.name: Performance Optimization
tasks.description: Optimize images, minify CSS, and implement loading optimizations

tasks.name: Accessibility Audit
tasks.description: Check and fix accessibility issues (contrast, keyboard navigation, ARIA labels)

tasks.name: Final Integration and Polish
tasks.description: Combine all components, fix any remaining issues, and prepare for deployment

tasks.name: Documentation
tasks.description: Create comprehensive README with setup instructions and project details

milestones.name: Project Setup Complete
milestones.description: All base files and directory structure created

milestones.name: Core Components Implemented
milestones.description: All major page sections built and styled

milestones.name: Content Integration Complete
milestones.description: All snack content and images added to the page

milestones.name: Responsive Design Complete
milestones.description: Page fully responsive across all target devices

milestones.name: Project Finalized
milestones.description: Ready for deployment with complete documentation
